login.title: VIP Member
login.subtitle: Sign in
login.help: If you cannot sign in: turn off private browsing, check Wi‑Fi or mobile data, then restart the app and try again.

error.empty: Please enter your email and password.
error.network: Cannot connect to the network. Check your connection and try again.
error.tooManyRequests: Too many sign-in attempts. Please wait and try again.
error.operationNotAllowed: Sign-in is not available. Please contact the administrator.
error.internalError: A server error occurred. Please try again later.
error.unauthorizedDomain: Sign-in is not allowed on this app. Please contact the administrator.
error.privateBrowsing: Turn off private browsing or use a normal browser window.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Check your connection and try again.

forgotPassword.title: VIP Member
forgotPassword.subtitle: Reset password
forgotPassword.intro: We’ll email you a link to set a new password. After you finish in your inbox, return to the sign-in screen and log in with your new password.
forgotPassword.step1: Enter the email address you used when you registered.
forgotPassword.step3: Open the email and follow the link to set a new password (check spam/promotions if needed).
forgotPassword.step4: Go back to the sign-in screen and log in with your new password.
forgotPassword.spamHint: If you don’t see the email, check your spam or promotions folder.
forgotPassword.success: Reset email sent. Open it and follow the steps to set a new password.

error.network: Cannot connect to the network. Check your connection and try again.
error.sendFailed: Could not send the email. Please check your address.

register.title: VIP Member
register.subtitle: Create account
register.nameHint: Used for ID verification at the store. Please enter your real name.
register.agreeAria: Agree to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy
register.agreeText: I agree to the <termsLink>Terms of Use</termsLink> and <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink> <req>*</req>

error.birthMonth: Enter birth month in YYYY-MM format.
error.agreeTerms: You must agree to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.
error.empty: Please enter your email and password.
error.emailInUse: This email is already in use.
error.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
error.tooManyRequests: Please try again after a moment.
error.networkRetry: A network error occurred. Please try again.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.unsupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser. Try Chrome, Firefox, or Edge.
notifications.iosNote: Note: Web Push has limitations on Safari for iOS.
notifications.pushDesc: Receive new messages, coupons, and announcements

install.title: Add to Home Screen
install.subtitle: To use FKT7 like an app,
install.subtitle2: add it to your Home Screen.
install.iphoneSafariIntro: With this page open in Safari, follow the steps below.
install.iphoneChromeIntro: With this page open in Chrome, follow the steps below.
install.androidChromeIntro: With this page open in Chrome, follow the steps below.
install.step1SafariDetail: Tap the share icon (square with an arrow) near the bottom center of the screen.
install.step2SafariDetail: In the menu, find and tap “Add to Home Screen.”
install.step3Detail: Tap “Add” in the top-right corner to finish.
install.step1ChromeTitle: Tap the Share button next to the address bar
install.step1ChromeDetail: Tap the share icon next to the address bar at the bottom.
install.step2ChromeDetail: Scroll the menu and tap “Add to Home Screen.”
install.androidStep1Title: Tap the menu (⋮) in the top-right
install.androidStep1Detail: Tap the three-dot menu icon in the top-right corner.
install.androidStep2Title: Choose “Install app” or “Add to Home Screen”
install.androidStep2Detail: Tap “Install app” or “Add to Home Screen.” The label may vary by device or Chrome version.
install.footer: After adding, the FKT7 icon will appear on your Home Screen.
install.footer2: You can use it smoothly like an app ♛
install.lineTitle: If the link won’t open in LINE
install.lineIntro: LINE’s in-app browser may block the link. Try the following:
install.lineLi1: Long-press the link and choose “Open in browser”
install.lineLi2: LINE Settings → LINE Labs → turn on “Open links in default browser”
install.lineLi3: Copy the URL and paste it into Safari or Chrome

home.emptyChatTitle: Send a message to the manager
home.messageInputPlaceholder: Message… (Enter for new line, Shift+Enter to send)
home.chatNetworkTimedOut: The request timed out. Check your connection and try again.
home.fileTooLarge: File size must be 5MB or less
home.fileTypeNotSupported: Only images (JPEG/PNG/GIF/WebP) or PDF are supported
